---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Gonzalo Salomoni"
date: "2026-06-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(sf)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
```

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# 1. MAPA WARDS 2011
# -----------------------------

wards1993 <- st_read(
  "C:/Users/gonza/Documents/Irlanda del Norte/osni_open_data_largescale_boundaries_wards_1993.geojson",
  quiet = TRUE
)

identity_2011_wards <- read_excel(
  "C:/Users/gonza/Documents/Irlanda del Norte/Census2011_national identity.xlsx",
  sheet = "Ward",
  skip = 5,
  col_names = FALSE
) %>%
  transmute(
    ward = .[[1]],
    ward_code = .[[2]],

    british = as.numeric(.[[4]]),
    irish = as.numeric(.[[5]]),
    northern_irish = as.numeric(.[[6]]),

    identity_majority = case_when(
      british == pmax(british, irish, northern_irish, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "Identidad británica",
      irish == pmax(british, irish, northern_irish, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "Identidad irlandesa",
      northern_irish == pmax(british, irish, northern_irish, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "Identidad norirlandesa"
    )
  )

map_2011 <- wards1993 %>%
  mutate(
    ward_join = str_to_upper(str_trim(NAME))
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    identity_2011_wards %>%
      mutate(
        ward_join = str_to_upper(str_trim(ward))
      ),
    by = "ward_join"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    identity_majority = if_else(
      is.na(identity_majority),
      "Identidad británica",
      identity_majority
    )
  )
```

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# 2. MAPA WARDS 2021
# -----------------------------

wards2021 <- st_read(
  "C:/Users/gonza/Documents/Irlanda del Norte/osni_open_data_largescale_boundaries_wards_2012.geojson",
  quiet = TRUE
)

identity_2021_wards <- read_excel(
  "C:/Users/gonza/Documents/Irlanda del Norte/census-2021_identidad.xlsx",
  sheet = "Ward",
  skip = 7
) %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      -c(Geography, `Geography code`),
      as.numeric
    )
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    ward = Geography,
    ward_code = `Geography code`,

    british =
      `British only` +
      `British and Irish only` +
      `British and Northern Irish only` +
      `British, Irish and Northern Irish only`,

    irish =
      `Irish only` +
      `British and Irish only` +
      `Irish and Northern Irish only` +
      `British, Irish and Northern Irish only`,

    northern_irish =
      `Northern Irish only` +
      `British and Northern Irish only` +
      `Irish and Northern Irish only` +
      `British, Irish and Northern Irish only`,

    identity_majority = case_when(
      british == pmax(british, irish, northern_irish, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "Identidad británica",
      irish == pmax(british, irish, northern_irish, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "Identidad irlandesa",
      northern_irish == pmax(british, irish, northern_irish, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "Identidad norirlandesa"
    )
  )

map_2021 <- wards2021 %>%
  left_join(
    identity_2021_wards,
    by = c("WardCode" = "ward_code")
  )
```

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# 3. FUNCIÓN DE MAPA
# -----------------------------

hacer_mapa_identidad <- function(data, mostrar_leyenda = TRUE) {

  ggplot() +
    geom_sf(
      data = data,
      aes(fill = identity_majority),
      color = NA
    ) +
    geom_sf(
      data = st_union(data),
      fill = NA,
      color = "grey25",
      linewidth = 0.35
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c(
        "Identidad británica" = "#E31A1C",
        "Identidad irlandesa" = "#1A9850",
        "Identidad norirlandesa" = "#6A3D9A"
      ),
      breaks = c(
        "Identidad británica",
        "Identidad irlandesa",
        "Identidad norirlandesa"
      ),
      na.value = "#E31A1C",
      name = NULL
    ) +
    coord_sf(datum = NA) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      legend.position = if (mostrar_leyenda) c(0.05, 0.95) else "none",
      legend.justification = c(0, 1),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.25, "cm"),
      plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0)
    )
}
```

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# 4. CREAR Y JUNTAR MAPAS
# -----------------------------

p2011 <- hacer_mapa_identidad(map_2011, mostrar_leyenda = TRUE)

p2021 <- hacer_mapa_identidad(map_2021, mostrar_leyenda = FALSE)

grid.arrange(
  p2011,
  p2021,
  ncol = 2,
  top = "Identidad nacional por wards: 2011 y 2021"
)
```

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# 5. GUARDAR
# -----------------------------

png(
  "identidad_nacional_wards_2011_2021.png",
  width = 3000,
  height = 1500,
  res = 300
)

grid.arrange(
  p2011,
  p2021,
  ncol = 2,
  top = "Identidad nacional por wards: 2011 y 2021"
)

dev.off()
```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```
